subcodes.first_line: O Abu-Basir! Arise and warn them that have denied the signs of the All-Merciful and have kept themselves from this Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ابا بصیر قم و انذر الذینهم کفروا بایات الرحمن و جعلوا انفسهم عن هذا الرضوان
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech, @station of the Manifestation of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @chastisement and requital, @service to others; to the Cause of God
